subcodes.first_line: The evanescent servant testifieth that there is none other God but Him, Who hath ever been hidden, treasured in the Repository of the Unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد الخادم الفانی انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مکنونا مخزونا فی کنز الغیب
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
